name: fable-mode
description: A documentation-only Codex plugin that adds one reusable skill for intent-aware work, constraint integrity, grounding checks, capability fit, verification-first implementation, and concise reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Use one careful Codex workflow for intent-aware work
interface.longDescription: Fable Mode is an unofficial, original, provider-neutral Codex skill for deliberate task framing, constraint integrity, output-form selection, grounding checks, capability fit, audience-aware response shaping, engineering implementation, verification-first delivery, and concise final reporting. It is documentation-only and adds no tools, servers, hooks, network calls, dependencies, or telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-mode to choose the right reasoning depth.
Use $fable-mode to fix this without over-scoping.
Use $fable-mode to keep constraints, output form, and grounding honest.
